nasb.text: And they laid hands on them and put them in jail until the next day, for it was already evening.

esv.text: And they arrested them and put them in custody until the next day, for it was already evening.

cnv.text: 於是下手拿住使徒。那時天已經晚了，就把他們拘留到第二天。

ccb.text: 下令拘捕二人，因天色已晚，就把他们扣押了一夜。

csbs.text: 于是他们下手捉拿了彼得和约翰。因为天已经晚了，就把他们关在监里，直到第二天。
